title: DEVELOPMENTAL DIVERSITY SERVICES - 211info
text: BARBARA ROSS BUILDING DEVELOPMENTAL DIVERSITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management; individual and family support plans; access to brokerage services for transportation; in-home supports or residential placement; and employment and vocational services. 4185 SW Research Way Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 766-6130 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6130 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who can help the applicant through the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CHILDREN’S OUTPATIENT PROGRAM COUNSELING SETTINGS - SCHOOL-BASED MENTAL HEALTH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BARBARA ROSS BUILDING
